settings.heading: Corporate Gifting
settings.subheading: A Signature Corporate gesture that builds a lifelong partnership — thoughtfully crafted, impeccably delivered.
settings.custom_text: Every corporate hamper is curated around your brand, occasion and budget — from the contents and colour palette to custom branding, a personal note and the finishing ribbon. There is no fixed catalogue; tell us your vision and quantity, and our team will craft a bespoke proposal, end to end.
settings.cta_heading: Let's craft your corporate gifting programme
settings.cta_text: Tell us your occasion, quantity and timeline. Our team will design a bespoke proposal within 48 hours.
